value: **EXIT XLV immediately** — If not executed at Monday open, execute now. Drug pricing risk + losing RS. No ceasefire scenario rescues XLV. Proceeds to BIL.
**DO NOT add XLE Monday** — Ceasefire scenario renders energy add highly risky. Oil CTA crowding (90th pctile) = violent unwind if war ends. Hold current 12%; add suspended until Tuesday resolution.
**WATCH Trump ultimatum midnight Tuesday** — Binary catalyst. Check overnight oil futures (DBO/USO) and gold futures pre-market Wednesday for outcome signal. No action before resolution.
**Monitor USD/JPY at 160** — BOJ intervention risk is real at 159.64. An unexpected yen spike from BOJ action would be risk-off cascading. Keep BIL/SHY as buffer.
**T-002 deliberation in progress** — BIL/SHY positions remain valid as cash management even if "higher-for-longer" label is retired. Thesis relabeling not position exit.

value: **Ceasefire Fails / Escalation (HIGHEST)**: Trump ultimatum expires Tuesday. Iran doesn't comply. US strikes power plants. WTI gaps to $125-130+. Portfolio benefits (energy + gold), but DBO stop might be tested on volatility. Asymmetric upside for current holdings.

**Ceasefire Signed (MODERATE probability ~40%)**: Portfolio faces -15% hit on commodity sleeve (IAU -5-10%, XLE -8-10%, DBO -20%). Short-covering rally in equities won't offset commodity losses given 25% commodity/energy weight. Rapid rebalance needed Wednesday.

**USD/JPY BOJ Intervention (EMERGING)**: 159.64 is above 155 alert level. Sudden yen spike = global carry unwind = risk-off cascade = equities selloff + gold spike. BIL/SHY provide protection but equity whipsaw possible. Watch 160 level.
